---
title: "MOFA - Data preparation"
author: "Bruno Palau"
date: "2025-10-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())

# Set path
if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Darwin"){
  mount_path <- "/Volumes/"
} else if (Sys.info()["sysname"] == "Linux"){
  mount_path <- "/mnt/"
} else {
  stop("Operating system is not supported")
}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)

DATA_PATH <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/"
MOFA_INPUT_PATH <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/MOFA/"
```

# RNA
we read in the batch corrected vst corrected RNA counts
```{r}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

# --- Load and clean RNA data ---
RNA_raw <- read.delim(paste0(mount_path, "/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/data/RNASeq/Rout/tables/RNAseq/vstcounts_adj.txt"), sep = "\t")

RNA_raw <- RNA_raw %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("sample_id") %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id = str_split_i(sample_id, ".FIXT", 1),
    Immucan_id = gsub("\\.", "_", sample_id)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-sample_id)

# --- Select most variable genes ---
n_genes <- 1000  # adjust as needed

gene_vars <- apply(RNA_raw %>% dplyr::select(-Immucan_id), 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_genes]

RNA_filtered <- RNA_raw[, c("Immucan_id", top_genes)]

# --- Map Ensembl IDs to gene symbols ---
ensembl_ids <- str_split_i(top_genes, pattern = "\\.", 1)

gene_symbols <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = ensembl_ids,
  column = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  multiVals = "first"
)

# Fallback: if mapping fails, keep original Ensembl
final_names <- gene_symbols
missing <- is.na(final_names)
final_names[missing] <- top_genes[missing]

# Apply name mapping (excluding Immucan_id column)
colnames(RNA_filtered)[-1] <- final_names

# --- Save final file ---
write.csv(RNA_filtered, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/RNA_named.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


# interactions
```{r}
files <- list.files(DATA_PATH, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "interactions")

# IF interactions or minor celltype interactions for IMC
files <- files[grepl("_IF|minor", files)]

list_df <- lapply(files, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(x) 
  if ("immucan_id" %in% colnames(df)){
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id)
  }
  if (grepl("normalized", x)){
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_norm_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }else{
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }
  return (df)
})

# Combine by column "SampleID", keep all sample IDs (full outer join)
combined_df <- purrr::reduce(list_df, function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "Immucan_id")) %>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))

bad_features <- colnames(combined_df)[colSums(is.na(combined_df) | combined_df == 0) >= 170]

combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  dplyr::select(-all_of(bad_features))

# 1. Compute feature–feature correlation matrix
corr_matrix <- cor(combined_df %>%
                     dplyr::select(-Immucan_id), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


# 2. Convert to distance matrix for clustering
dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(corr_matrix))  # use absolute correlation

# 3. Hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "average")

# 4. Cut tree at correlation threshold (e.g. 0.9 → height = 0.1)
clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 0.2)

# Save cluster assignment for downstream mapping
cluster_map <- tibble(
  feature = names(clusters),
  cluster_id = as.integer(clusters)
)

# Save to disk
write.csv(cluster_map, file = paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/V6_minor_clusters_interactions.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 5. Pick one representative per cluster
selected_features <- sapply(unique(clusters), function(cl) {
  members <- names(clusters[clusters == cl])
  members[1]  # pick the first (or use more logic, e.g. highest variance)
})

combined_df <- combined_df[,c("Immucan_id", selected_features)]

write.csv(combined_df, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/interactions.csv"))
```

# fractions
```{r}
files <- list.files(DATA_PATH, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "fractions")

list_df <- lapply(files, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(x) 
  if ("immucan_id" %in% colnames(df)){
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id)
  }
  if (grepl("stroma", x)){
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_stroma_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }else{
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_tumor_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }
  return (df)
})

# Combine by column "SampleID", keep all sample IDs (full outer join)
combined_df <- purrr::reduce(list_df, function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "Immucan_id"))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))


# 1. Compute feature–feature correlation matrix
corr_matrix <- cor(combined_df %>%
                     dplyr::select(-Immucan_id), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


# 2. Convert to distance matrix for clustering
dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(corr_matrix))  # use absolute correlation

# 3. Hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "average")

# 4. Cut tree at correlation threshold (e.g. 0.9 → height = 0.1)
clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 0.2)

# Save cluster assignment for downstream mapping
cluster_map <- tibble(
  feature = names(clusters),
  cluster_id = as.integer(clusters)
)

# Save to disk
write.csv(cluster_map, file = paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/V6_minor_clusters_fractions.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 5. Pick one representative per cluster
selected_features <- sapply(unique(clusters), function(cl) {
  members <- names(clusters[clusters == cl])
  members[1]  # pick the first (or use more logic, e.g. highest variance)
})

combined_df <- combined_df[,c("Immucan_id", selected_features)]



write.csv(combined_df, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/fractions.csv"))
```


# densities
```{r}
files <- list.files(DATA_PATH, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "density")

# IF interactions or minor celltype interactions for IMC
files <- files[grepl("_IF|minor", files)]

list_df <- lapply(files, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(x) 
  if ("immucan_id" %in% colnames(df)){
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id)
  }
  if (grepl("minor", x)){
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_minor_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }else{
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }
  return (df)
})

# Combine by column "SampleID", keep all sample IDs (full outer join)
combined_df <- purrr::reduce(list_df, function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "Immucan_id"))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-CD8_CD56_FOXP3_density_IF3)



# 1. Compute feature–feature correlation matrix
corr_matrix <- cor(combined_df %>%
                     dplyr::select(-Immucan_id), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


# 2. Convert to distance matrix for clustering
dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(corr_matrix))  # use absolute correlation

# 3. Hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "average")

# 4. Cut tree at correlation threshold (e.g. 0.9 → height = 0.1)
clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 0.2)

# Save cluster assignment for downstream mapping
cluster_map <- tibble(
  feature = names(clusters),
  cluster_id = as.integer(clusters)
)

# Save to disk
write.csv(cluster_map, file = paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/V6_minor_clusters_densities.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

# 5. Pick one representative per cluster
selected_features <- sapply(unique(clusters), function(cl) {
  members <- names(clusters[clusters == cl])
  members[1]  # pick the first (or use more logic, e.g. highest variance)
})

combined_df <- combined_df[,c("Immucan_id", selected_features)]

write.csv(combined_df, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/densities.csv"))
```



# cellohood
```{r}
files <- list.files(DATA_PATH, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "cellohood")

# only cellbased cellohood clusters
files <- files[grepl("density", files)]

list_df <- lapply(files, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(x) 
  if ("immucan_id" %in% colnames(df)){
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id)
  }
  if (grepl("cellbased", x)){
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_cellbased_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }else{
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  }
  return (df)
})

# Combine by column "SampleID", keep all sample IDs (full outer join)
combined_df <- purrr::reduce(list_df, function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "Immucan_id"))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))

colnames(combined_df) <- sub("_cellbased_p1$", "_P1",colnames(combined_df))
colnames(combined_df) <- sub("_cellbased_p2$", "_P2",colnames(combined_df))

write.csv(combined_df, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/cellohood.csv"))
```

# expressions
```{r}
files <- list.files(DATA_PATH, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "marker_expr")

list_df <- lapply(files, function(x){
  df <- read.csv(x) 
  if ("immucan_id" %in% colnames(df)){
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id)
  }
  colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"] <- paste0(colnames(df)[colnames(df) != "Immucan_id"], "_", str_split_i(str_split_i(basename(x), "_", -1), "\\.", 1))
  return (df)
})

# Combine by column "SampleID", keep all sample IDs (full outer join)
combined_df <- purrr::reduce(list_df, function(x, y) full_join(x, y, by = "Immucan_id"))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))



# 1. Compute feature–feature correlation matrix
corr_matrix <- cor(combined_df %>%
                     dplyr::select(-Immucan_id), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


# 2. Convert to distance matrix for clustering
dist_matrix <- as.dist(1 - abs(corr_matrix))  # use absolute correlation

# 3. Hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "average")

# 4. Cut tree at correlation threshold (e.g. 0.9 → height = 0.1)
clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 0.2)

# Save cluster assignment for downstream mapping
cluster_map <- tibble(
  feature = names(clusters),
  cluster_id = as.integer(clusters)
)

# Save to disk
write.csv(cluster_map, file = paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/V6_minor_clusters_expressions.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# 5. Pick one representative per cluster
selected_features <- sapply(unique(clusters), function(cl) {
  members <- names(clusters[clusters == cl])
  members[1]  # pick the first (or use more logic, e.g. highest variance)
})

combined_df <- combined_df[,c("Immucan_id", selected_features)]

write.csv(combined_df, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/expressions.csv"))
```

# Binary
## driver mutations and scores
```{r}
df <- read.csv(paste0(DATA_PATH, "/driver_mutations.csv"))


driver_mutations <- df %>%
  dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id) %>%
  mutate(across(
    .cols = -Immucan_id,   # exclude Immucan_id column
    .fns = ~ as.integer(as.logical(.))
  ))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))

df <- read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/scores_for_sharing/all_traits.csv"))

df <- df %>%
  dplyr::rename(Immucan_id = immucan_id) %>%
  dplyr::select(Immucan_id, TPS_score, CPS_score, TMB_score) %>%
  mutate(TPS_score = ifelse(TPS_score == "positive", 1, 0),
         CPS_score = ifelse(CPS_score == "positive", 1, 0),
         TMB_score = ifelse(TMB_score == "high", 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    .cols = -Immucan_id,   # exclude Immucan_id column
    .fns = ~ as.integer(as.logical(.))
  ))%>%
  mutate(Immucan_id = gsub("\\-", "_", Immucan_id))

binary <- driver_mutations %>%
  full_join(df, "Immucan_id")

write.csv(binary, paste0(MOFA_INPUT_PATH, "/binary.csv"))
```
